data.title: Conifex Announces First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call and Provides Operational Update
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on May 1, 2026, Conifex Timber Inc. disclosed its intention to unveil its Q1 2026 results prior to the market opening on Friday, May 15, 2026. The company, listed as CFF on the TSX, has arranged a conference call for May 15 at 9:00 AM PT / 12:00 PM ET to delve into its financial performance. Interested individuals can join the discussion by dialing the specified number.

data.title: ACT for ALS Reauthorization Act Introduced in the Senate
data.description: The ALS Network has praised the bipartisan bill introduced in the Senate, aiming to uphold progress in ALS research and availability of experimental treatments. On May 1, 2026, in Los Angeles, the organization voiced its approval for the legislation, emphasizing the significance of sustaining momentum in ALS research. This bill seeks to enhance access to critical therapies for ALS patients, reflecting a strong commitment to advancing treatment options. The ALS Network advocates for the importance of continued support for this cause, highlighting the potential impact on individuals living with ALS.

data.title: PACSUN ACCELERATES INTO MIAMI WITH OFFICIAL FORMULA 1® COLLECTION
data.description: Pacsun, a specialty fashion retailer focused on youth culture, is introducing a new collection in Miami that combines the vibrant energy of motorsport with bold colors, technical accents, and race-ready style. The launch event is scheduled for May 1, 2026, in Los Angeles. The collection aims to capture the excitement of race weekends and offers a fresh take on fashion with its unique blend of influences. Stay tuned for this exclusive collection, showcasing the synergy between motorsport and street style.

data.title: Arctic Canadian Diamond Company Ltd. files for CCAA protection
data.description: Burgundy Diamond Mines Limited has announced that its subsidiary, Arctic Canadian Diamond Company Ltd., has filed for insolvency protection under the Companies' Creditors Arrangement Act (CCAA). The filing comes as a result of financial difficulties faced by the subsidiary. The CCAA filing will allow the company to restructure its debts and operations under the supervision of a court-appointed monitor. This move impacts the operations and financial standing of Burgundy Diamond Mines Limited, as their subsidiary deals with this insolvency process.

data.title: Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund Provides Unaudited Balance Sheet Information and Announces Its Net Asset Value and Asset Coverage Ratios as of April 30, 2026
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in Houston, the Kayne Anderson Energy Infrastructure Fund, Inc. (NYSE: KYN) released an unaudited summary of its assets and liabilities. The company reported its net asset value and asset coverage ratios in compliance with the Investment Company Act of 1940 (the “1940 Act”) for April 30, 2026.

data.title: Chevron, Exxon Show Earnings Resilience But Stocks Fail Key Test
data.description: Amidst the conflict in Iran, both Exxon and Chevron have surpassed earnings expectations, driven by an increase in production volumes. Despite the positive financial results, the stocks of the companies did not pass a crucial test. Exxon and Chevron exhibited resilience in their earnings as they managed to exceed estimates even in the midst of the Iran war. Both companies experienced growth in their production volumes, contributing to their better-than-expected financial performance. However, the stocks of Exxon and Chevron did not perform well in a significant evaluation.

data.title: Potential Public Safety Power Shutoff for Hughenden and Surrounding Area
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, AltaLink is closely monitoring the weather conditions for extreme wildfires predicted for Sunday, May 3rd in the Municipal District of Provost.

data.title: Lockheed Martin Awarded U.S. Space Force Space-Based Interceptor Contracts to Meet Layered Missile Defense Demand
data.description: In Huntsville, Alabama, on May 1, 2026, Lockheed Martin (NYSE: LMT) received a contract from the U.S. Space Force Space Systems Command to work on the Space-Based Interceptor (SBI) program. This selection highlights crucial steps in developing key components for the program, ultimately advancing efforts to enhance space defense capabilities.

data.title: DigitalBridge Prices $300 Million Financing Facility, to Repay Outstanding Series 2021-1 Notes
data.description: DigitalBridge Group, Inc. revealed that its subsidiaries, DigitalBridge Issuer, LLC and DigitalBridge Co-Issuer, LLC, have priced an offering of $300 million in total of Series 2026-1 6.326% Secured Fund Fee Revenue Notes, Class A-2. The Class A-2 Notes will have interest payments on a quarterly basis, with the aggregate principal amount specified. The repayment date for the Class A-2 Notes has also been disclosed, indicating a significant financial move within the business sector.

data.title: InBloom Jewelry Designs Kinetic Sculpture "Belonging" for Rotary Club of Carroll Creek
data.description: Located in Frederick, Maryland, InBloom Jewelry, led by Stacey Krantz, unveiled their latest accomplishment on May 1, 2026. The custom fine jewelry studio completed their biggest design to date named "Belonging." This masterpiece has been installed as one of the newest kinetic sculptures in Carroll Creek Linear Park.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Hits Highs After Bullish Pause; Apple, Broadcom In Buy Zones
data.description: After a brief pause, the stock market showed a late-week rebound, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq hitting new highs. Apple and Broadcom were seen entering buy zones amidst the bullish trend. Dow Jones Futures reflected the market hitting highs after the pause, indicating a positive turn for investors.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq, S&P Make History; Buffett's Berkshire Reports Earnings Saturday (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Nasdaq composite outperformed other major indexes. Berkshire Hathaway, a stock in Warren Buffett's portfolio, is scheduled to report its earnings on Saturday. The Nasdaq and S&P indices made historic gains in the stock market. Berkshire's earnings announcement will be covered live in the Investor's Business Daily. The market performance on Friday was noteworthy, setting new records for the Nasdaq and S&P indices.

data.title: Thomson Reuters Announces Cash Distribution Per Share and Share Consolidation Ratio for Return of Capital and Share Consolidation Transactions
data.description: Thomson Reuters (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI) has disclosed that participating shareholders will be receiving a cash distribution of US$1.435518 per common share. The shares will start trading on a post-consolidated basis from May 4, 2026. This announcement was made on May 1, 2026, in Toronto.

data.title: Perspire Sauna Studio Opens 100th Studio as Wellness Demand Heats Up Nationwide
data.description: Costa Mesa, California - On May 1, 2026, Perspire Sauna Studio, the top franchise in the nation for infrared sauna and red-light therapy, celebrated its 16th anniversary. The franchise has seen remarkable growth over the years and now stands as the biggest sauna franchise in the country. Specializing in full spectrum infrared and red-light therapy, Perspire Sauna Studio has set itself apart in the industry.

data.title: MSIG USA's New E&S Platform Earns A+ Rating from S&P Global Ratings
data.description: On May 1, 2026, MSIG USA revealed that S&P Global Ratings has given an A+ financial strength rating and issuer credit rating with a stable outlook to MSIG Specialty Insurance America, Inc., the company's recently formed excess and surplus (E&S) insurer. This rating is a significant achievement as it signifies the financial stability and reliability of the new company in the insurance sector. This development highlights MSIG USA's commitment to providing high-quality insurance services through its E&S subsidiary.

data.title: New Harley-Davidson motorcycles for sale may not be the headline this May--but for riders across Lake Norman, the real story is where the community comes together
data.description: In May 2026, Tilley Harley-Davidson is set to rev up Mooresville and Statesville with an exciting lineup of events. The renowned dealership will host bike nights, charity rides, and community-driven activities throughout the month. Residents can look forward to engaging in these thrilling events that aim to bring the community together. Tilley Harley-Davidson's May 2026 calendar is packed with opportunities for motorcycle enthusiasts to connect and support charitable causes. Whether attending bike nights or participating in charity rides, there will be plenty of chances for individuals to get involved. Joining in these events is a fantastic way to experience the camaraderie of the local motorcycle community while giving back to those in need. Don't miss out on the chance to be part of these exciting activities happening in Mooresville and Statesville this May.

data.title: California King Salmon is Back for the 2026 Fishing Season
data.description: In San Francisco, the 2026 commercial fishing season is set to showcase the return of California King salmon, a highly coveted seasonal seafood delicacy on the West Coast. The fresh, wild-caught California King salmon is expected to become available in select markets, fish counters, and restaurants, providing consumers and chefs with the chance to indulge in its exceptional flavor, vibrant color, and top-notch quality. The California commercial salmon season is scheduled to operate from May 1 onward, presenting an exciting opportunity for seafood enthusiasts to savor this popular delicacy.

data.title: Bitcoin's rise to $80K appears likely, as spot volumes and futures interest signal a bullish market shift.
data.description: With Bitcoin's price approaching $80,000, the market appears to be favoring bulls again. This shift is indicated by increasing spot volumes and futures open interest. Investors are closely watching as the cryptocurrency nears this significant value.

data.title: Netflix will release 'Narnia' in theaters for the first time, deviating from its usual streaming-only strategy.
data.description: The company is departing from its traditional practice of only premiering movies on its streaming platform.
GameStop holds stake in eBay for potential bid, part of CEO Ryan Cohen's plan to turn it into "$100B+ juggernaut".
